---
title: "Publications"
---

This page will list peer-reviewed publications, conference abstracts, preprints, and selected manuscripts once citations are finalized.

## Predictive calculators and web-based tools

::: {.publication}
**Intracranial Chordoma Predictive Calculator**  
*Status:* Add finalized journal citation, DOI, PubMed link, and calculator link.
:::

::: {.publication}
**Grade II–III Intracranial Meningioma Survival Estimator**  
*Status:* Add finalized citation and calculator link.
:::

::: {.publication}
**Traumatic Brain Injury Discharge and Resource Utilization Calculator**  
*Status:* Add finalized citation and calculator link.
:::

## Research areas

- Neuro-oncology outcomes and survival prediction
- Registry-based neurosurgical outcomes research
- Neurotrauma prognosis and resource utilization
- Vascular and perioperative outcomes
- Web-based calculator development

## Citation template

Use this format for finalized entries:

```markdown
::: {.publication}
**Title**  
Authors.  
*Journal.* Year;Volume(Issue):Pages. DOI.  
[PubMed](#) | [Manuscript](#) | [Calculator](#)
:::
```
